data.description: Energy Intel Deputy Bureau Chief Bakr: I am not expecting the UAE to flood the market once the war ends. But they will have the flexibility to produce higher than their pre-war quota.
Fed bids for 7-year notes total $5.5 bln.

data.title: Coca-Cola Leads Dow Jones After Earnings Top Views, But This Worries Executives
data.description: Despite surpassing first-quarter expectations, Coca-Cola remains wary of consumer sentiment. The company outperformed in Q1, leading the Dow Jones, but executives express concern about consumer behavior. The post-earnings report shows positive results, with revenue and profit beating projections. However, Coke executives emphasize the need to monitor the mood of consumers closely. This cautious approach comes as the company aims to navigate potential shifts in consumer preferences and market dynamics.

data.title: LandBridge Stock Sees Composite Rating Jump To 96 As Consolidation Continues
data.description: LandBridge experienced a significant increase in its IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating, rising to 96 on Tuesday from 94 the previous day. This jump indicates a positive trend in the company's performance as consolidation in their sector continues.

data.title: Velo3D, Inc. Announces Closing of $50 Million Underwritten Registered Direct Offering of Common Stock
data.description: Velo3D, Inc., a top metal additive manufacturing company based in Fremont, California, disclosed on April 28, 2026, the successful completion of a firm commitment underwritten registered direct offering of 3,571,428 shares of its stock.

data.title: BTC drops to 1-week low due to $100 oil sparking new Asia crisis fears. Global oil supply concerns push BTC down.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin has dropped once again, leading to BTC hitting its lowest point in a week. This decline was triggered by worries resurfacing regarding global oil supply issues, particularly due to the blockade at the Strait of Hormuz.

data.title: $4.4M USDT prize pool for BitMart's Trade-to-Feed comp in May 2026, celebrating 8th anniversary & listing of EAT coin.
data.description: BitMart is celebrating its 8th anniversary with the launch of the 30-day Trade-to-Feed competition, commemorating the strategic listing of EAT, the inaugural cause coin on the exchange.

data.title: Bitcoin price falls under $76K due to mixed onchain signals, unable to surpass $80K resistance. Increasing spot CVD may aid turnaround.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin faced resistance at the $80,000 mark due to weak onchain fundamentals. However, there is a potential for recovery as spot CVD shows an upward trend. This situation indicates that Bitcoin may be poised for a rebound despite the challenges in breaking past the $80,000 threshold. Investors should keep an eye on these developments as they could signal a shift in the market sentiment towards Bitcoin.

data.title: ROHM Launches an Ultra-Compact Wireless Power Chipset for Wearables
data.description: On April 28, 2026, ROHM Semiconductor revealed the launch of a new wireless power supply IC chipset in Santa Clara, CA and Kyoto, Japan. This groundbreaking chipset includes the ML7670 receiver and ML7671 transmitter, both engineered to support Near Field Communication (NFC) technology. This innovation is targeted towards compact wearables like smart rings and smart bands, along with peripheral devices such as smart pens. The development of these components showcases ROHM's commitment to advancing technology for the benefit of users of these small electronic devices.

data.title: Aero Continues East Coast Expansion with Miami Flights Debuting in Fall 2026
data.description: In Los Angeles on April 28, 2026, Aero marked its fifth anniversary with a significant development in its growth strategy. The private jet airline introduced Gulfstream IV-SP aircraft to its fleet, bolstering its services. To further expand on the East Coast, Aero launched two additional nonstop routes. This move signifies the company's dedication to enhancing its operations and catering to the increasing demand for private jet travel.

data.title: SAS aims AI agents at industry's toughest challenges
data.description: SAS announces its industry accelerators are enhancing competitiveness across various sectors, from finance to manufacturing. The lack of sector-specific AI talent is identified as a barrier to success for many businesses. The announcement was made at SAS Innovate event in Dallas on April 28, 2026.

data.title: Surgical Information Systems Appoints Division Presidents to Lead Software and Revenue Cycle Management Growth
data.description: A recent announcement states that Surgical Information Systems (SIS) based in Alpharetta, Georgia, introduced a new leadership structure on April 28, 2026. This change aims to enhance their emphasis on healthcare software innovation and revenue cycle management services specifically designed for ambulatory surgery centers. The company is recognized as a top provider in the industry.

data.title: FuturHealth Among the First to Offer Eli Lilly's Oral GLP-1, Orforglipron, Expanding Access to Next-Generation, Non-Injectable Treatment
data.description: FuturHealth, a clinically-guided health platform focusing on long-term health beyond weight loss, has introduced a new once-daily pill for its customers. Available through the platform, this pill can now be conveniently delivered to homes. This development was revealed on April 28, 2026. FuturHealth's expansion includes offering a wider range of care options to enhance the health support provided.

data.title: National Safety Council and Wolters Kluwer Enablon Report Finds Adoption of AI Growing Rapidly Among EHS Professionals
data.description: Ninety percent of safety professionals support the integration of artificial intelligence (AI) into workplace safety measures, emphasizing the importance of establishing clear guidelines. This cautious yet enthusiastic approach to AI implementation was highlighted in Washington on April 28, 2026. The growing trend of incorporating AI into safety programs is gaining momentum, underscoring the need for defined protocols to ensure its effectiveness.

data.title: Leading Edge Materials reveals outcomes of the yearly shareholder meeting.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the global economy is experiencing a slowdown, with a growth rate of only 2.5% projected for this year, down from the initial forecast of 3.2%. The manufacturing sector is particularly affected, with a decrease in output by 1.7%. Additionally, global trade is expected to suffer a decline of 2.6%, marking a significant decrease from the previous estimate of 2.5% growth. These factors are contributing to an increase in global unemployment rates, which are expected to rise by 0.1% to reach 5.6%. Despite these challenges, certain regions are still showing resilience, with emerging markets in Asia projected to grow by 4.5% and Latin America by 1.8%.  Overall, these numbers indicate a concerning trend in the global economy, highlighting the importance of implementing measures to stimulate growth and mitigate the impact of current economic challenges.

data.title: FIRST FINANCIAL ANNOUNCES BOARD ELECTION AND INCREASED DIVIDEND AT ANNUAL MEETING
data.description: In Abilene, Texas on April 28, 2026, First Financial Bankshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIN) announced a $0.22 per share cash dividend for the second quarter in correlation with the 2026 Annual Shareholders' Meeting.

data.title: Bioretec Ltd - Manager's transactions - Stephen Industries Inc Oy
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Bioretec Oy announced important managers' transactions at 16:55 EEST. Stephen Industries Inc Oy, a key player, was identified by the notification requirement. The disclosed information is critical for investors and stakeholders to track the movements and decisions within Bioretec Oy. This update sheds light on the key individuals and their roles within the company, ensuring transparency and accountability.
